movie.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.
movie.tagline: The rise and fall of the Corleone empire.
movie.title: The Godfather Part II
